title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Kansai Nerolac

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Kansai Nerolac
jsonLd.description:
Kansai Nerolac is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Vadodara. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Kansai Nerolac:
Kansai Nerolac is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kansai Nerolac!
